sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77937" key="paradio/rqwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραδιόρθ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77937.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">marginal correction</tr_>, in pl., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.33b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
